name: MiniMax variance probe
description: Two additional runs on minimax-m2-7 × v5.1-oc × claim-office-EM (smoke had 0/15, n=1). Combined with smoke gives n=3 — checks whether the 0/15 verification result is stable spec-misunderstanding or single-run variance. Decides whether MiniMax is a robust 'broken-on-novel-kata' finding or needs higher min_replicates.
